---
title: "Andrea Recine"
subtitle: "PhD Candidate in Economics — Sapienza University of Rome"
page-layout: full
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:andrea.recine@uniroma1.it
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/andrerecio
---


----------------------------------------------------------------

## About me {.central}

I am a PhD candidate in Economics at the [Department of Economics and Law](https://ecodir.web.uniroma1.it/it) at [Sapienza University of Rome](https://www.uniroma1.it/).

My research focuses on Time Series Econometrics, Bayesian Econometrics and Applied Macroeconomics.


**E-mail**:  [andrea.recine@uniroma1.it](mailto:andrea.recine@uniroma1.it)

----------------------------------------------------------------------
